entities.description: The study of tissue changes caused by disease

entities.description: The main structural axis of the urdbean plant

entities.description: The outermost layer of cells in the plant tissue

entities.description: Strands of conducting tissue in the stem

entities.name: XYLEM VESSELS
entities.description: Water-conducting cells in the vascular system

entities.name: CAMBIAL CELLS
entities.description: Meristematic cells responsible for secondary growth

entities.name: PHLOEM PARENCHYMA
entities.description: Parenchyma cells associated with the phloem tissue
